chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-1857 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For katcha peshi. 13.12.2016. None present for petitioners. Mr. Ashfaque Nabi Kazi, Assistant A.G = Learned Assistant A.G submits that notices have not been served on respondents. However, he undertakes that police officials will conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and will provide protection to the petitioners, if they are approached by the petitioners with such a request, but strictly in accordance with law. This petition is disposed of with the above observation and with the directions that private respondents will not cause any harassment to the petitioners and in this regard police officials will provide protection to the petitioners and will ensure that their life and liberty is not violated by private respondents. JUDGE Shahid
